name: OncoZenge AB (publ)
summary: OncoZenge AB (publ), a pharmaceutical company, develops healthcare products for cancer supportive care. It offers BupiZenge, which has completed Phase 2 clinical trial for the treatment of oral mucositis. The company was founded in 2020 and is headquartered in Bromma, Sweden. OncoZenge AB (publ) is a subsidiary of Moberg Pharma AB (publ).
